title: Flea Treatment in Edison, NJ
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Edison, NJ. Effective flea control for homes and businesses. Same-day service available. Call now for $350-$650 treatments.
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Edison home or business? Our professional flea treatment services provide fast, effective solutions to eliminate fleas at every life stage. Serving residential and commercial properties throughout Edison, we use proven methods to protect your family, pets, and customers from these persistent pests.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Edison and the greater New Jersey area with safe, EPA-approved flea treatments. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of flea control in Edison's diverse properties, from historic homes near Roosevelt Park to modern apartments and commercial spaces, ensuring thorough elimination with guaranteed results.
localContext: Edison's mix of single-family homes, garden apartments, and commercial properties along Route 1 and Oak Tree Road creates varied environments where fleas can thrive, especially in pet-friendly households and businesses. The township's suburban character with plenty of green spaces and proximity to wooded areas means pets often bring fleas indoors, making professional treatment essential for complete eradication.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Edison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Edison range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work in Edison homes?
faqs.answer: Most Edison residents see a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination typically occurs within 2-3 weeks as our treatments target fleas at all life stages, including eggs and larvae. A follow-up treatment may be recommended for severe infestations.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children in Edison?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied by our licensed technicians. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces dry completely. All our treatments are specifically chosen to be effective against fleas while minimizing risk to your family.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment service in Edison?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency flea treatment services throughout Edison, NJ, subject to availability. We understand that flea infestations require immediate attention, especially in homes with pets and children. Contact us early in the day for the best chance of same-day service.
